description_long: This is a large, modern house surrounded by lush landscaping, including numerous trees and shrubs with purple and green foliage. The house features a flat roof with multiple terraces, some of which are furnished with outdoor seating and planters. The structure is composed of clean, geometric lines and large windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. There is a swimming pool and a circular outdoor seating area in the backyard, as well as a driveway and garage visible from the front. The property is enclosed by a low wall, and the garden is meticulously arranged with paved walkways and decorative elements. The overall design emphasizes open spaces, outdoor living, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A spacious, modern house with flat roofs, large windows, multiple terraces, and lush landscaping, including a pool and outdoor seating areas. The property is enclosed by a low wall and features clean, geometric lines.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from the front, highlighting the main entrance, driveway, garage, and a large terrace with planters and seating. The lush landscaping and perimeter wall are prominent.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the side of the house with the driveway, garage, and a clear view of the upper terrace and rooftop amenities. The landscaping continues along the side, and the pool area is partially visible.
description_view_2: View 2 focuses on the backyard, showcasing the swimming pool, circular seating area, and extensive garden. The terraces and large windows are visible, emphasizing the connection to outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: View 3 highlights the opposite side of the house, with a clear view of the pool, outdoor seating, and the lush, tree-lined perimeter. The flat roof and multiple terraces are also visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass walls
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide, modern door with a paved approach, flanked by large windows and minimalistic landscaping, no porch or columns.
